coding.label: coding
coding.recommended_path: work-dev lane: implementations, scripts under `scripts/`, PLAN/EXECUTE per `docs/operator-agent-lanes.md`; run tests locally before ship.
coding.runner_up_path: system_native_action lane: if task is purely harness / cadence tooling in existing scripts.
coding.why_note: Description centers on code, tests, or repo implementation work.

research_to_artifact.label: research_to_artifact
research_to_artifact.recommended_path: WORK lanes + docs: synthesize into `docs/skill-work/*`, strategy-notebook `days.md` / inbox, or prepared research artifacts; verify tier for factual claims when needed.
research_to_artifact.runner_up_path: governance_review: if output would promote into SELF/EVIDENCE, stage via `recursion-gate.md` instead of direct profile edits.
research_to_artifact.why_note: Description reads as synthesis, reading, or turning sources into a durable note or lane artifact.

recurring_workflow.label: recurring_workflow
recurring_workflow.recommended_path: Document the rhythm in the appropriate skill or `docs/skill-work/*` calendar; wire to existing cadence scripts (`coffee`, `dream`, weekly brief runners) rather than bespoke daemons.
recurring_workflow.runner_up_path: system_native_action: only if recurring run is satisfied by extending an existing Grace-Mar harness script.
recurring_workflow.why_note: Task explicitly asks for repeatable process or scheduled rhythm across sessions or tools.

system_native_action.label: system_native_action
system_native_action.recommended_path: Use existing Grace-Mar tooling: `.cursor/skills/*`, `scripts/harness_warmup.py`, `coffee` / gate-review / strategy scripts as named in docs; READ `AGENTS.md` for Record boundaries.
system_native_action.runner_up_path: coding: if the intent is primarily new automation code rather than invoking existing rituals.
system_native_action.why_note: Description matches built-in rituals, harnesses, gate queue, or companion-approved merge path.

governance_review.label: governance_review
governance_review.recommended_path: `users/<id>/recursion-gate.md` staging + companion review; merge only via `scripts/process_approved_candidates.py` per `AGENTS.md`. No ad-hoc `self.md` edits.
governance_review.runner_up_path: research_to_artifact: if the only output is WORK-layer notes that never touch SELF/EVIDENCE.
governance_review.why_note: Task is about staging, approving, or whether something becomes governed Record knowledge.

unclear.label: unclear
unclear.runner_up_path: Re-run after one concrete sentence: deliverable, lane, and whether Record must change.
unclear.why_note: Insufficient signal or conflicting cues; abstain rather than forcing a lane.

suggested_next_steps.coding: Name target files or `scripts/` entrypoints; choose PLAN vs EXECUTE; run the relevant test command before commit.
suggested_next_steps.research_to_artifact: List primary sources (URLs or repo paths) and the intended notebook or doc section; add verify tags where claims bite.
suggested_next_steps.recurring_workflow: Specify frequency, owner, and which existing skill or cadence runner it resembles (coffee, weekly brief, dream).
suggested_next_steps.system_native_action: Pick the nearest named skill/script from docs; if touching Record staging, gate only—no direct merges.
suggested_next_steps.governance_review: Stage `CANDIDATE-*` in `users/<id>/recursion-gate.md` with evidence; companion approves before `process_approved_candidates.py`.
suggested_next_steps.unclear: Add one sentence each: outcome, lane (strategy vs dev vs gate), and whether anything must enter SELF or EVIDENCE.
